description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back wings, and two large turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with prominent upward-curved winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the flight crew. The exterior is primarily white with blue accents and large '787' markings on the tail fin.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with swept-back wings, underwing engines, and a blue-marked tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical spread of the wings with engines visible beneath each wing.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the full fuselage, underwing engines, landing gear, and the prominent '787' marking on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan with upward-curved winglets.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the fuselage, engines, landing gear, and tail markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and prominent upward-curved winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
